buttons.primary: bg-[#1a2744] hover:bg-[#141e33] text-white shadow-sm rounded-md h-10 px-6 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 shadow-sm rounded-md h-10 px-4 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md h-9 px-3
buttons.icon: h-8 w-8 p-0 rounded-full hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-500

cards.lead_card: bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200 overflow-hidden
cards.metric_card: bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 p-4 flex flex-col gap-1

badges.fit_high: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.fit_medium: bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.fit_low: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#1a2744] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

implementation_steps.details: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom color palette (#1a2744 primary, #10b981 accent) and font settings.
Set CSS variables in index.css to match the design system (light mode default). Ensure body background is #f8fafc (slate-50).
Build a main Layout component with the sticky header and centered container.
Create the LeadCard component with collapsible functionality, fit score badges, and message tabs using Shadcn.
Assemble the dashboard with the 'Run Analysis' button, Progress bar, and the list of LeadCards.

universal_guidelines: Prioritize data density without clutter. Use whitespace to separate logical groups, not just to fill space.
Ensure all interactive elements (buttons, tabs, copy icons) have clear hover states.
Use 'Lucide React' icons for all iconography (User, Building, Copy, Check, BarChart, etc.).
Fit Scores (1-10) must be visually distinct: 8-10 (Green), 5-7 (Yellow/Amber), 1-4 (Red).
Loading states are critical: Show a progress bar with specific text steps (e.g., 'Fetching leads...', 'Analyzing sentiment...', 'Generating drafts...') instead of a generic spinner.
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Stick to flat, clean, solid colors for professional readability.
The 'Run Analysis' button should be prominent (large size) but professional.
Message copy functionality must trigger a Sonner toast notification.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.
